review: Layout is okay. Giving 2 stars because I can't have a friend pick up my order without giving them my phone. Extremely inconvenient. Update on June 24, 2026: Too many steps required to do simple tasks. The app also doesn't make it easy to see if an order has been placed or if more info is needed. Very frustrating!

has to be among the worst made apps out there. takes way too long to load, a constant reminder not to drive while using it, well duh. it's been helpful though in other ways. I no longer eat your so-called food.
